name: Router
summary: Resolve and dispatch URI routes through a connector router.
description: Router is an if-uri urirun connector for resolve and dispatch URI routes through a connector router. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Router capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use router:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
